<!-- Title: Short, descriptive (e.g., Add X to Y) -->

## Summary
- What changed?
- Why this change is necessary

## Target branch
- This PR should target `dev` (not `master`).

## Checklist
- [ ] CI builds are green
- [ ] Changes deployed and verified on staging
- [ ] Tests updated or added where applicable

## Release notes / deployment steps
- Describe any special deployment steps or migration notes.

If this change must go to `master` immediately, add the label `emergency-release` and notify the team.
